_comment: REPRESENTATIVE captured-geometry fixture (NOT synthetic). Main window lives on a SECONDARY monitor positioned to the LEFT of the primary, so its physical X is NEGATIVE (Windows virtual-screen space). Secondary is 100% scale. This fixture also exercises a non-zero scroll_offset_css: the caller reported the anchor in DOCUMENT-relative coords, so scroll_offset carries the negative scroll position (page scrolled 250 CSS px down, 40 right) to map back to the viewport. Expected = client-origin (negative physical) + (anchor + scroll)*scale.
description: left monitor (negative physical X) + document-relative scroll offset, 100% scale
